## Checklist

- [ ] Document builds locally with `latexmk -pdf notes.tex` in the affected directory
- [ ] Changes follow the existing chapter and marginnote conventions
- [ ] No new warnings introduced in the build log (or they are explained below)
- [ ] For content changes: references/citations are added to the relevant `.bib` file
- [ ] PDF is *not* committed by hand — CI will rebuild and commit it on merge to `main`
